name: com.refined-x/public-ask
title: Refined-X Public Ask
description: Refined-X Public Ask: NLWeb v0.55-compatible restricted /ask subset. Supports POST /ask with conversational_search, list, summarize, buffered SSE, MCP ask over Streamable HTTP, and allowlisted query controls: topic, content_type, published_after, published_before, max_results. Does not support /await, promise responses, elicitation, chatgpt_app, arbitrary extension fields, result actions, or long-term memory.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: 可选 Bearer API Key。匿名默认 list；summarize 等模式需要凭据。
